name: aicl/aicl
description: AICL — AI-first Laravel application framework. Composer package providing auth, RBAC, Filament admin panel, and a rich component library for AI-generated dashboard applications.

suggest.meilisearch/meilisearch-php: Required for Meilisearch Scout driver support. Recommended search engine for DDEV/local development.
suggest.http-interop/http-factory-guzzle: Required by meilisearch/meilisearch-php as HTTP factory implementation.
suggest.matchish/laravel-scout-elasticsearch: Required for Elasticsearch Scout driver support (v7.x). Alternative to Meilisearch.
suggest.elasticsearch/elasticsearch: Required by matchish/laravel-scout-elasticsearch for Elasticsearch 8.x connectivity.
